title: abutilon pulchrum
intro: Abutilon pulchrum is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the Indian mallow or butterfly weed. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. Abutilon pulchrum is often used in herbal preparations like tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
